name: Curried Potato and Cauliflower Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine cauliflower and potato in a medium pan with salted water to cover.
2. Cover and cook for 5 minutes.
3. Remove 1 cup of the cauliflower and set aside.
4. Cook the remaining cauliflower and potato until very tender.
5. Drain. Peel the potato. Set the vegetables aside.
6. Melt butter in the same pan. Add onion and cook over medium heat until tender, about 5 minutes.
7. Add ginger and curry powder and cook for 30 seconds.
8. Place 2 cups of well-cooked cauliflower, potato, onions with any liquid from the pan and half & half into a blender jar. Puree.
9. If the mixture is too thick, add some chicken broth.
10. Return to the pan. Add the reserved 1 cup of cauliflower.
11. Add the remaining chicken broth and heat through over low heat.
12. Do not boil. Season to taste with salt and freshly ground white pepper.
Yield: 2 generous main-dish servings.
